Package com.kbtu.university.model.research

Class ResearchPaperBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.kbtu.university.model.research.ResearchPaperBuilder
public class ResearchPaperBuilder extends Object
Fluent builder for ResearchPaper. Lets callers configure any subset of the eight optional fields, validates required fields at build time, and keeps ResearchPaper's constructor surface small.
